summary: Rename the frontier candidate to claude-frontier-v2 in model profiles.
proposedChange: Replace the frontier candidate id claude-frontier with claude-frontier-v2 (relativeCost 90). relativeCost is an abstract configured weight, never a price.
expectedTradeOffs: Frontier-required tasks route to the renamed candidate; per-accepted-change configured relative cost rises slightly.
rollbackCriteria: Revert if the escaped-defect count on frontier-routed accepted changes does not improve within one review interval.
